meta.purpose: APP-ONLY overlay. The print deck stays timeless; at read-time the app maps each card's live_hook to real BRC 2026 instances + a location, turning the Turtle Dare into a located quest. Card meanings never change.

location_status.zone: a typical placement zone; exact address TBD
location_status.citywide: happens all over the city — not a fixed place
location_status.roaming: a mutant vehicle; no fixed address
location_status.pending_api: exact GPS drops via the Burning Man API — camps Aug 9 (dev) / Aug 23 (public); art Aug 9 (dev) / Aug 30 gates (public)

meta.refresh_plan: Register at api.burningman.org and playaevents.burningman.org before Aug 9, 2026. After Aug 9: pull camp+art GPS (respect the dev embargo), geocode clock addresses with the iBurn geocoder (github.com/iBurnApp/iBurn-Data, MIT), and mirror iBurn data/2026 (late Aug) for offline GeoJSON + .mbtiles map tiles. Then flip each 'pending_api' hook below to 'fixed' with a real address.

camp:terrible-turtle.directions: Home. Your own shell — you know where camp is. (Placement drops via the BM API in August.)

the-man.directions: Center of the open playa — walk toward the Man on the 12:00 axis.

temple.directions: Straight out past the Man on the 12:00 axis, deep playa side.

art:resonant-spire.directions: A 33-ft spire on the open playa (exact spot lands with the art map at gates — ask Playa Info or scan the horizon at night for the tower of light).

art:yggdrasil.directions: A bamboo World Tree on the open playa (exact spot on the art map at gates).

place:trash-fence.directions: Walk outward on any avenue until you reach the pentagon fence at the city's edge.

camp:barbie-death.directions: A loud, absurd camp — likely the outer streets. Address via the WWW guide in August.

instances: For They Know Not What They Do
art:caduceus.directions: A 21-ft steel caduceus on the open playa (art map at gates).

camp:gigsville.directions: One of the old camps — find it via the WWW guide or just ask; everyone knows Gigsville.

art:mebuyan-pulse.directions: A climbable cluster of spheres on the open playa (art map at gates).

art:heart-remains.directions: A glowing ribcage on the open playa (art map at gates).

art:titanic.directions: A 200-ft sinking ship — big dramatic art like this usually sits out in deep playa. Exact spot on the art map at gates.

art:behind-closed-eyes.directions: A reclining topographic figure on the open playa (art map at gates).

ritual:dust-angel.directions: Anywhere the playa is open under you — lie down and let it mark you.

camp:carcass-wash.directions: Hosted by PolyParadise — check the WWW guide for the wash times and camp address (verify the host each year).

camp:zendo.directions: Placed near the city's care/medical services — find it via the WWW guide or ask a Ranger. It's always there when it's needed.

deep-playa.directions: The open dark beyond the Man toward 12:00. Walk until the city's noise falls away.

artcar:mayan-warrior.directions: It roams — catch it deep playa at night. Follow the lasers and the crowd.

workshop:wellness.directions: Dozens run daily citywide — check the WWW guide for a time and place near you.

sunrise_soundcamp.directions: Out in deep playa toward 12:00 before dawn — follow the bass and the crowd toward the open dark.

art:pulse.directions: A cracked heart pulsing light, on the open playa (art map at gates).

ritual:howl.directions: Anywhere with a clear view of the horizon at sunrise or sunset. The whole city howls with you.

place:center-camp.directions: 6:00 & Esplanade — the heart of the city. When lost, walk toward the center.

place:playa-info.directions: Playa Info is in Center Camp (6:00 & Esplanade); Rangers are citywide — flag any khaki-clad Ranger.

principle:lnt.directions: Wherever you stand — pick up the matter out of place around you.

instances: QUEEN: Quantum Universal Epic Era Now!
art:queen.directions: A reclining monumental woman on the open playa (art map at gates).

weather:whiteout.directions: Wherever it catches you. Sit down where you are.

camp:consent.directions: The Dome's address is in the WWW guide; consent practice you can do anywhere.

principle:self-reliance.directions: Wherever you are — carry your own water first.

camp:tea-house.directions: Dozens recur citywide — find a cushioned tea oasis via the WWW guide or by wandering.

art:above-and-below.directions: A treehouse-and-beanstalk on the open playa (art map at gates).

art:seven-sisters.directions: Illuminated Pleiades stars on the open playa (art map at gates).

principle:gifting.directions: Anywhere, to anyone — the whole city runs on it.

ritual:playa-name.directions: Wherever you meet people who see you.

ritual:greeters.directions: At the Gate — or become the greeting yourself, anywhere in the city.

camp:soulmate-outlet.directions: A deadpan 'warehouse' camp — address in the WWW guide in August.

camp:ashram-galactica.directions: The grand desert hotel — address in the WWW guide in August.

daytime_soundcamp.directions: The loud outer corners near 2:00 and 10:00 — follow the daytime bass.

art:headwaters.directions: A bamboo labyrinth on the open playa (art map at gates).
